title: CameraBrightness Property
description: Specifies the brightness setting for the camera used in the current sequence.
notes:
The CameraBrightness property is normally left at the value of 128.

When a new sequence is created, the default CameraBrightness value is set for the current camera.

Before changing CameraBrightness, try adjusting the lighting and aperature of the lens to obtain the desired brightness.
  If additional adjustment is necessary, then change the CameraBrightness value.  The CameraBrightness property can have values in the range of 0 - 255, with higher values giving more brightness.
